category_sources: source_facts.description expands CKAN as the Comprehensive Kerbal Archive Network, a Kerbal Space Program mod manager/archive network.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ckan; source_facts.description expands the official acronym as Comprehensive Kerbal Archive Network.
docs_sources: Official repository README is an additional official documentation entry point.
source_facts.homepage points to the official KSP-CKAN GitHub repository; its wiki is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/KSP-CKAN/CKAN; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Comprehensive Kerbal Archive Network; source_facts.executables lists the ckan CLI.
